nasb.text: Then David the king went in and sat before the Lord and said, “Who am I, O Lord God, and what is my house that You have brought me this far?

esv.text: Then King David went in and sat before the Lord and said, “Who am I, O Lord God, and what is my house, that you have brought me thus far?

cnv.text: 於是大衛王進去，坐在耶和華面前，說：“耶和華　神啊，我是甚麼人？我的家算甚麼，你竟帶領我到這個地步？

ccb.text: 于是，大卫王走进会幕，在耶和华面前坐下，说：“耶和华上帝啊，我是谁？我的家算什么？你竟如此厚待我。
